HomeBlogsEssential Medical Equipment for Setting Up a Home ICU

Essential Medical Equipment for Setting Up a Home ICU

A checklist of necessary monitors, beds, and support systems for critical care at home.

Core Monitoring Devices

A home ICU setup requires precise monitoring to ensure patient safety.

  • •Multi-para monitors for vitals
  • •Pulse oximeters for oxygen levels
  • •Infusion pumps for precise medication delivery
  • •Oxygen concentrators or cylinders

Comfort and Mobility

Specialized furniture is essential for both patient comfort and the ease of providing care.

  • •Electric hospital beds with adjustable positions
  • •Air mattresses to prevent pressure sores
  • •Suction machines for airway clearance
  • •Patient hoists for safe transfers
